stemHtml: Regarding pavement strength, you are at the apron prior to taxi-out and assess your aircraft ACN to be 45. – According to the aerodrome chart, the reported PCN for the taxiway you have to take is 45. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Ask for an alternate taxi route because you are unable to use this route.
options.b: Continue to use the taxi route as the PCN must be equal to or greater than the ACN.
options.c: Contact ATC and ask for their advice.
options.d: A specific waiver from the aerodrome operator is needed.
